text:

> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=157251

Sorry for long delayed answer... I updated port and did submit new shar
archive, but apparently my desktop Postfix configuration gone mad (at
some time) and none of my replies reached FreeBSD.org

Finally I gave-up using mutt & Postfix.... :/


I attached new shar.

in this version I fixed critical bug and added support for LaTeX output
(but you'll probably need TeXLive for it to be able to produce pdf/ps)

-- 
Aldis Berjoza
